package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for service_method_accepts_gin_context: Service methods that take `*gin.Context` instead of domain inputs plus `context.Context`.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule168NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule168NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule168NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario168Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule168NegativeService, input Rule168NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
